type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in 2011 figures over REVISED 2010 figures is due to Increased Production in 2011.  An error was found in the calculation of Nitrogen Oxides figures in the 2010 Report submitted. The correct value is a total of 22,598 tonnes of Nitrogen Oxides produced in 2010.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in 2011 figures over 2010 figures is due to an increase in production for 2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Decrease in 2010 was due to 2 of our 5 boilers being placed into long-term layup in October 2010 which resulted in reduced production levels in the Fall of 2010 and thus lower nitrogen oxides emissions. Also a decrease in Combustion Turbine operation in 2010.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Two new submarine cables connecting PEI to NB were commissioned in 2017. Since their commissioning,
the amount of electricity generated by Maritime Electric's has decreased; thus, reducing the amount of
emissions produced by the company.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Minor reduction in 2008 due to less production from Fossil Fuel Boilers and less production in Stationary Gas Turbines as compared to 2007 production numbers.  No changes are anticipated in production levels over the next five year period.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Sulphur Dioxide Levels increased in 2008 as compared to 2007 figures due to slightly higher sulphur% levels in the Bunker C Fuel Oil supplied by the oil refinery which was partially offset by decreased production levels in 2008 in our Fossil Fuel Boilers

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher production rates from our boilers attached to STACK 2 partially offset by a reduction in production from the boilers attached to STACK 1 resulted in an overall slight increase in PM10 levels in 2008 as compared to 2007.  No changes are anticipated

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher production rates from our boilers attached to STACK 2 partially offset by a reduction in production from the boilers attached to STACK 1 resulted in an overall slight increase in PM2.5 levels in 2008 as compared to 2007.  No changes are anticipated

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Significant increase in 2009 due to increased production from Fossil Fuel Boilers and a slight increase in production from Combustion Turbines as compared to 2008 numbers.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Sulphur Dioxide emissions increased in 2009 as compared to 2008 figures due to significantly higher production levels in 2009 in our Fossil Fuel Boilers and our Stationary Combustion Turbines.  No significant changes in these levels are anticipated over t

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher production levels in all of our Fossil Fuel Boilers resulted in an overall increase in PM10 levels in 2009 as compared to 2008.  No significant changes in particulate PM10 levels are anticipated over the next 5 year period.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher production rates for our Fossil Fuel Boilers attached to Stack # 1 were the main contributor to increased PM2.5 emission levels in 2009 as compared to 2008 numbers.  No significant changes in PM2.5 levels are expected over the next 5 years.
